quotes: Headline → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the top third, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px
Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px)
border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px; — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is always required on every instance
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
Headline → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.

Button → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.

Button radius (mandatory, never change): `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Maintain brand alignment, structural typography, and precise button geometry for the signature Gradient Callout CTA block.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA Section features a headline and single button horizontally centered and stacked over a branded orange/yellow gradient background image. The background fallback must be Sunshine (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b). The headline must be centered Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) in Nunito Sans weight 800 at 28px. The button must have a Deep Blue fill (color.secondary.deep_blue = #003D74), white text with a Gold arrow (color.cta.gold_accent = #FFC20E), and must use the asymmetric signature border-radius (radius.cta.signature_button = 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px).
rules.snippets: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯
